_meta.note: Distances are approximate, rounded from rider reports. TODO(M2): replace with GPS-measured figures.

plans.title: 7 days — recommended
plans.blurb: Comfortable daily distances with time for stamps, food stops and photos. The pass day (Day 4) is kept deliberately short.

days.notes: Buy your passport at the start (cash!). Flat riverside all day; last stamp in Seoul is Gwangnaru.
Old rail-trail section around Neungnae Station; weir stamps begin.
Quiet South Han river valley. Binae Island booth is remote — check your ink.
The big one: Suanbo, then the Ihwaryeong climb (5km, up to ~12%). Start early.
Long weir-to-weir riding on the Nakdong.
Some short steep ramps ('walls') south of Daegu.
Finish at the estuary. Get the passport verified at the staffed center. City traffic near the end — see the city riding guide.

plans.title: 5 days — fast
plans.blurb: For fit riders comfortable with 120km+ days. Little slack for weather or mechanicals.

days.notes: Sleep at the foot of the pass.
